get.summary:
Returns the live column definitions for a Trino table, formatted so the
"Adopt as CRD" UI flow can prefill its editor and POST straight into the
structured `create_table` endpoint. Lives separately from `get_tables` so
the expensive per-column introspection isn't paid on every list refresh.

parameters.description: Filter secrets whose name starts with this prefix (e.g. `my-app/staging/`).

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description:
The hierarchical prefix whose secrets should be deleted. Must be
non-empty and end with `/` (e.g. `my-app/staging/`). Deletion is
recursive: every secret whose name starts with this prefix is removed.

get.summary: List all user attributes for an organization.
get.description:
Returns all users and their attributes for the specified organization.
This is useful for administrative views showing all user access configurations.
Only organization viewers and above can access this endpoint.

200.description: All user attributes in the organization
List all users in an organization

201.description: User added to the organization successfully

409.description: User already exists in the organization

204.description: User removed from the organization successfully

get.summary: List all attributes for a user in an organization.
get.description:
Returns all RLS attributes assigned to the user in the specified organization.
Attributes are in `namespace::value` format (e.g., `region::occitanie`).

put.summary: Set all attributes for a user (replaces existing).
put.description:
Replaces all existing attributes for the user with the provided list.
All attributes must be in valid `namespace::value` format.
Only organization owners can perform this operation.

post.summary: Add a single attribute to a user.
post.description:
Adds a new attribute to the user's existing attributes.
The attribute must be in valid `namespace::value` format.
If the attribute already exists, this is a no-op.
Only organization owners can perform this operation.

delete.summary: Remove a single attribute from a user.
delete.description:
Removes the specified attribute from the user.
The attribute path parameter must be URL-encoded (e.g., `region%3A%3Aoccitanie`).
Only organization owners can perform this operation.

BackupOrigin.description:
Whether the backup was user-initiated or produced by a scheduled run that
the operator adopted. Mirrored into the DB column `origin` (VARCHAR(16)
with a CHECK constraint on the same vocabulary) and into the OpenAPI spec
as an `enum`, so every consumer (operator via progenitor, frontend via
hey-api, SDK users) sees the same closed set.

data_container_id.description: The data container to import to/export from

destination_data_container_id.description:
The data container where the files will be extracted to when importing
or where the files will be extracted from when exporting

file_name.description: The name of the archive file

file_path.description: The path of the archive file

file_size.description: The size of the archive file

prefix.description:
If the operation is an import, the prefix to add to all files when extracting the archive
If the operation is an export, the prefix to filter which files to include in the export (only files matching this prefix will be exported)

strip_prefix.description: Whether to strip the prefix from file paths when creating the archive (export only)

default_category.description: Default category if no label matches (e.g., "inconnu")

prefix_regex.description:
Regex to extract prefix from source path (single capture group)
Example: "(condominium-\\d+)/"

ceph_cluster_namespace.description: K8s namespace of the CephCluster to deploy the object store into

rgw_instances.description: Number of RGW gateway instances for HA (default: 2)

CephRgwInternalRequest.description: Ceph RGW creation request — uses zone_id which gets resolved to ceph_cluster_namespace

ceph_cluster_namespace.description:
Pre-resolved namespace — used by operator which already knows the namespace from CRD.
External handlers MUST sanitize this field (set to None) before processing to prevent
namespace injection from user input.

zone_id.description: Zone identifier — resolved to ceph_cluster_namespace by the console

api_key.description: API key for the AI model (e.g., Mistral)

labels.description: Document classification labels (supports both static and dynamic labels)

model_base_url.description:
Base URL for the model API. Defaults to Mistral API when not set.
Set to a vLLM/KServe endpoint for self-hosted models (e.g., "http://ministral-3-8b-rocm-predictor.kserve.svc.cluster.local/v1").

part_number.description: Part number (1-indexed as per S3 API)

destination_prefix.description: Optional prefix path within the destination bucket

destination_dd.description: UUID of the destination object storage Data Dock

destination_prefix.description: Optional prefix path within the destination bucket

CopyS3SourceConfig.description: S3 source configuration for S3-to-S3 copy

data_container_id.description: Data Container ID for the source S3 bucket (DataDock is resolved automatically)

source_prefix.description: Optional prefix to filter source files (stripped during copy)

CrdStatusSnapshot.description:
Projection of a Hyperfluid CRD's `.status` subresource, suitable for
surfacing in list endpoints so the UI can render a live status badge
without having to call kube-apiserver itself.

- For `TrinoSchema`: `phase` + `message` are populated; drift fields
  stay empty.
- For `TrinoTable`: all four fields are meaningful — `missing_columns`
  and `extra_columns` come from the reconciler's drift detection.

extraColumns.description:
Columns present in Trino but not declared in the CRD spec. The
reconciler never drops these automatically. Empty for schemas.

missingColumns.description:
Columns declared in the CRD spec but absent from the actual Trino
table (subject to opt-in migration). Empty for schemas.

phase.description:
`Pending` / `Ready` / `Drifted` / `Failed` / `Terminating`.
Stringly-typed because `TrinoSchema` and `TrinoTable` don't share
the same phase enum (Drifted is Table-only).

access_key_secret_name.description: Name of the control-plane secret holding the S3 access key id

description.description: Optional description (DB-only, not stored in CRD)

insecure.description:
Skip TLS certificate verification when probing the S3 endpoint.
Intended for development (self-signed certs). Defaults to false.

name.description: Must be a valid slug: lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only; cannot start or end with a hyphen.

secret_access_key_secret_name.description: Name of the control-plane secret holding the S3 secret access key

tags.description: User-defined tags (DB-only, not stored in CRD)

image_pull_secrets.description: Names of secrets from the secret store to use as image pull secrets.

name.description: Must be a valid slug: lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only; cannot start or end with a hyphen.

CreateContextEnricherPipelineRequest.description:
Context Enricher pipeline request: enrich Iceberg table with L0/L1 abstracts via LLM.
Reads content (L2) from a source table, writes enriched rows (content + L0 + L1) to a destination table.
Enables lineage: object storage → OCR → ice_raw → hippocampe → ice_enriched

CreateContextProviderBody.description: Request to create a context provider.

config.description: Configuration JSON based on provider type

CreateContextualRestrictionBody.description: Request to create a contextual restriction.

CreateCopyPipelineRequest.description: Copy pipeline request: Import API source → S3 destination

routing_rules.description: Routing rules: label -> list of destinations

CreateFileSorterRequest.description: FileSorter pipeline request with semantic groupings

destination_data_container_id.description: Destination S3 DataDock to land the files into

CreateIcebergTableMetadataRequest.description:
Request to create Iceberg table metadata.

The modern flow is structured: the client sends `columns`,
`medallion_tier`, and optional partitioning/sort/properties; the backend
generates the DDL, executes it, saves metadata, and materializes the
TrinoTable CRD from the same structured input.

`ddl_statement` is kept as an optional backward-compatibility field for
callers that still generate DDL client-side. When both are present,
structured fields win and `ddl_statement` is ignored.

backup_target_id.description:
BackupTarget to use for on-demand and scheduled backups. Required when
`backup_policy` is `automated`; ignored when `manual`.

database_name.description:
Name of the application database to create inside the PostgreSQL cluster.
Must be a valid PostgreSQL identifier: lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only; must start with a letter or underscore.

description.description: Optional description for this database instance

name.description: Must be a valid slug: lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only; cannot start or end with a hyphen.

username.description:
Postgres role name. Lowercase letters, digits and underscores; must start
with a letter or underscore. The CRD `metadata.name` is derived by
replacing `_` with `-`, so the same identifier shows up in the UI, the
Postgres cluster, and Kubernetes.

max_model_len.description: Maximum model context length (optional, for generation models)

CreateOpenDataPipelineRequest.description: Open Data pipeline request: download open data CSV and load into Iceberg table

CreatePageSplitterPipelineRequest.description: PageSplitter pipeline request: splits OCR'd documents by page markers

oneOf.description: FileRouter: S3-to-S3 routing based on labels
Copy: Import API source → S3 destination
PageSplitter: splits OCR'd documents by page number
ContextEnricher: enrich Iceberg table rows with L0 abstracts and L1 overviews via LLM
GDrive: download files from GDrive and load into S3
OpenData: download open data CSV and load into Iceberg table

CreatePipelineRequestV2.description: Discriminated union for pipeline creation requests

CreateTableClassificationBody.description: Request to create a table classification.

CreateTrinoPipelineRequest.description: Trino-based pipeline request (Markitdown, HephaistosPdfeed, Labelizer, Omnifeed)

split_by_page.description:
When true, adds a PageSplitter step after OCR to split documents by page markers.
The split pages are written to a table named `{table_name}_split_pages` in the same schema.

DataContainerOverview.description: A summary of a data container

internal_host.description:
internal_host and internal_port composes the address to reach the data dock from inside the cluster.
This is mainly used for introspection

port.description: This is i16 to match the sqlx type for port but this should never be negative (constraints are already in place in the db)

sts_role_arn.description:
IAM role ARN for STS AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity (required for Ceph RGW)
Format: arn:aws:iam:::role/<role-name>

token_issuer_endpoint.description:
token issuer endpoint is the url to get
the token related to the service account

DataDockExternalResponseData.description: External API response — strips infra details (namespaces) from user-facing endpoints.

deleted.description: Number of secrets deleted under the prefix.

Configuration for a FileRouter destination
Allows routing to different Data Docks with specific prefixes

DynamicLabel.description:
Dynamic label configuration with format string and placeholders.
The format string contains placeholders like {year}, {date}, {name} that
get replaced with extracted values.

Placeholder definition for dynamic labels.
Used to extract variable parts from documents (dates, names, etc.)

source.description: Instructions for the LLM on how to extract this value from the document

FileSorter output configuration - combines 3 steps:
HephaistosPdfeed -> Labelize -> CategoryRouterMetadataAware

destination_s3_dd.description: UUID of the destination S3 Data Dock for sorted files

labels_yaml.description:
Labels for document classification in YAML format.
Supports both static and dynamic labels with placeholders.

Example:
```yaml
- id: facture_eau
  type: static
  description: "Water utility invoices"
- id: travaux
  type: dynamic
  description: "Construction work documents"
  format: "TRAVAUX/{year}/{date}"
  placeholders:
    - id: year
      source: "Extract the year"
      format: "YYYY"
```

model_api_key.description: API key for OCR and classification model

model_base_url.description: Base URL for the model API (e.g., vLLM endpoint). Defaults to Mistral API when not set.

source_file_connection_id.description: Source S3 connection ID for router (references input.dd_source)

unknown_placeholder_value.description: Value to use when a placeholder cannot be extracted (default: "unknown")

default_category.description: Default category if no label matches

source_prefix_regex.description: Regex to extract prefix from source path (single capture group)

FileSorterSourceConfig.description: FileSorter source configuration (S3 bucket for unsorted files)

data_container_id.description: Data Container ID for the source bucket (DataDock is resolved automatically)

folder_prefix.description: Optional folder prefix within the bucket

prefix.description: Optional folder prefix within the bucket

service_account_email.description: Service account email for GDrive connector authentication

ceph_zones.description: Available Ceph zones for DataDock creation.

console_base_domain.description: The base domain for the console (e.g., "localhost" for dev, "hyperfluid.app" for prod).

Harbor.description:
A harbor is a collection of [DataDocks](super::datadock::Datadock)
Each harbor belongs to an [Org](super::org::Org)
Each harbor has an owner who is a [User](super::user::User)

annotations.description:
Annotations mirrored from the `TrinoSchema` CRD metadata when
`source = Crd`. Empty otherwise.

IcebergTableMetadata.description: Iceberg table metadata stored in Hyperfluid

annotations.description:
Metadata annotations copied from the CRD when `source = Crd`. The UI
surfaces well-known keys (e.g. `hyperfluid.nudibranches.tech/source`,
`hyperfluid.nudibranches.tech/pipeline`) as coloured badges.

ImportApiExtraFilter.description: Filter on a field within the `extra` JSON object returned by the Import API.

KafkaMetadata.description: Dynamic metadata about the Kafka cluster (stored as JSONB)

Label.description:
Full label definition supporting both static and dynamic types.
This is the primary type used for document classification labels.

Example YAML:
```yaml
# Static label
- id: facture_eau
  type: static
  description: "Water utility invoices"

# Dynamic label with placeholders
- id: travaux
  type: dynamic
  description: "Construction work documents"
  format: "TRAVAUX/{year}/{date}-{work_name}"
  placeholders:
    - id: year
      source: "Extract the year from the document"
      format: "YYYY"
      rules: ["Must be 4 digits"]
```

oneOf.description: Dynamic label - category path with extracted placeholders

LabelType.description: Label type - either static or dynamic with placeholders

FileRouter routing rules: label -> list of destinations
Example: {"type::invoice": [DestinationConfig { data_dock_id: "uuid", bucket_id: "uuid", prefix: "invoices/" }]}

PipelineMetadata.description: Pipeline metadata configuration (common to all pipeline types)

enabled.description: Whether the pipeline is enabled (only applies to CronJobs)

one_off.description: Whether this is a one-off job (true) or a scheduled CronJob (false)

persist_logs.description:
When true, runtime logs are persisted to the console (queryable from the
UI). When false, logs are emitted to stdout only and not persisted.
Defaults to true.

oneOf.description: Copy: Import from external API to S3 destination

enabled.description:
Whether the pipeline is enabled. Only applies to CronJob pipelines.
When false, the CronJob will be suspended. Defaults to true (enabled).

instances.description: Number of PostgreSQL instances (1=standalone, 2+=HA with replicas)

destination_data_container_id.description: The bucket where the zip file will be uploaded

destination_file_name.description: The name of the zip file

destination_file_path.description: Where the zip file will be stored in the bucket (optional path)

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes - determines upload strategy

oneOf.description: Simple single PUT upload for files < 100MB

file_path.description: The full path where the file will be stored

upload_url.description: Presigned PUT URL for uploading the file

file_path.description: The full path where the file will be stored

key.description: The object key in the bucket

part_size.description: Size of each part in bytes (last part may be smaller)

PrepareArchiveImportResponse.description: Response for preparing archive import - either simple upload or multipart

Ref.description:
A reference to a file in a storage bucket
This reference is created upon scanning a bucket and is used to track the
status of the file through the pipeline.

labels.description:
ARN-style metadata accumulated per step for this ref. Append-only.
Format `hf:pipelines:{kind}[:{qualifier}]::{value}` — see
`crate::models::labels` for builders. Used by retriable steps to skip
already-completed work and by routing steps to record produced paths.

locked_by.description:
The ID of the pipeline run that locked the reference
This is used to track the progress of the pipeline run
If the pipeline run is unhealthy (missed a heartbeat), the reference
will be unlocked and the pipeline run will be considered failed.

ResourceSource.description:
Whether a schema / table was declared via a Hyperfluid CRD
(`TrinoSchema`, `TrinoTable`) or materialized ad-hoc through Trino DDL.

Lives here (domain layer) rather than in the HTTP DTO layer because
both domain models and HTTP responses carry this label.

ResourceTier.description:
Predefined resource tiers for container apps.
Memory limits are always equal to memory requests.

SecretType.description: The type of value stored in the secret.

iam_sa_client_id.description: The client_id of the Keycloak client.

iam_sa_credentials_path.description: The secret path in the secret store for the service account credentials.

iam_sa_id.description: This is the storage ID of the Keycloak client NOT the client_id.

SetUserAttributesRequest.description: Request to set all attributes for a user (replaces existing).

attributes.description:
List of attributes in `namespace::value` format.
Example: `["region::occitanie", "department::sales"]`

flatten.description: Whether to flatten directory structure (true) or preserve it (false)

length.description: Number of characters from SHA256 hash to use as suffix

dd_trino_int.description: UUID of the Trino Data Dock

model_base_url.description: Base URL for the model API (e.g., vLLM endpoint). Defaults to Mistral API when not set.

UpdateContextualRestrictionBody.description: Request to update a contextual restriction.

description.description: `null` clears the description; absent keeps the current value.

attribute_sources.description: Maps attribute names to the provider name that supplied them.
